mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 0 AS MENU_IDX, -1 AS PARENT_MENU_IDX, '' AS MENU_URL, '' AS MENU_URL_PARAM, '최상위' AS MENU_NAME, 0 AS PRINT_SEQ, 0 AS MANAGE_IDX, '' AS BOARD_CATEGORY1, 'ROOT' AS MENU_TYPE, 1 AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, '' AS DELETE_USE_YN, '' AS MENU_IMG FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, MANAGE_IDX, BOARD_CATEGORY1, MENU_TYPE, CASE WHEN MENU_TYPE = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, DELETE_USE_YN, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = -1 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ

SELECT LEVEL AS MENU_LEVEL, A.* FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, SOLO_YN, MENU_TYPE, GROUP_IDX, MANAGE_IDX, LINK_URL, VIEW_YN, MOBILE_VIEW_YN, MENU_TOP_ICON, BOARD_CATEGORY1, CASE WHEN MENU_TYPE = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND (VIEW_YN != 'N' OR MOBILE_VIEW_YN != 'N') ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ

SELECT level AS menu_level, A.* FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, MENU_TYPE, MANAGE_IDX, LINK_URL, VIEW_YN, MENU_LEFT_ICON, BOARD_CATEGORY1, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND
GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ ASC

SELECT level AS menu_level, A.* FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, MENU_TYPE, MANAGE_IDX, LINK_URL, VIEW_YN, MENU_LEFT_ICON, BOARD_CATEGORY1, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND VIEW_YN != 'N' AND GROUP_IDX = #{group_idx} ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ ASC

SELECT CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END as id, menu_name as label FROM CMS_MENU WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND parent_menu_idx = #{id}

SELECT a.HOMEPAGE_ID, a.MENU_IDX, a.PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE a.MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = a.MANAGE_IDX) ELSE a.MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, a.MENU_URL_PARAM, a.MENU_NAME, a.GROUP_IDX, a.MENU_TYPE, a.USE_YN, a.VIEW_YN, a.MOBILE_VIEW_YN, a.PRINT_SEQ, a.ADD_DATE, NVL(a.MOD_DATE, a.ADD_DATE) AS MOD_DATE, a.GROUP_IDX, a.MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME, a.MANAGE_IDX, a.CONTENT_TITLE_YN, a.LINK_URL, a.MENU_TOP_ICON, a.MENU_LEFT_ICON, a.BOARD_CATEGORY1, a.MANAGE_VIEW_YN, a.MANAGE_ID, a.SOLO_YN, a.manager_dept1, a.manager_name1, a.manager_phone1, a.manager_dept2, a.manager_name2, a.manager_phone2, a.manager_dept3, a.manager_name3, a.manager_phone3, a.manager_dept4, a.manager_name4, a.manager_phone4, a.manager_dept5, a.manager_name5, a.manager_phone5, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG, m.DEPT_NAME AS MANAGE_DEPT, m.POSITION AS MANAGE_POSITION, m.PHONE AS MANAGE_PHONE, m.WORKER AS MANAGE_NAME FROM CMS_MENU a, ( SELECT w.HOMEPAGE_ID, w.WORK_IDX, d.DEPT_NAME, w.POSITION, w.PHONE, w.WORKER FROM WORK_MNG w, DEPT_MNG d WHERE w.HOMEPAGE_ID = d.HOMEPAGE_ID AND w.DEPT_IDX = d.DEPT_IDX AND w.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) m WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = m.HOMEPAGE_ID(+) AND a.TASK_IDX = m.WORK_IDX(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, MENU_TYPE, USE_YN, VIEW_YN, PRINT_SEQ, ADD_DATE, MOD_DATE, GROUP_IDX, MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME, MANAGE_IDX, CONTENT_TITLE_YN, MENU_IMG, LINK_URL, MENU_TOP_ICON, MENU_LEFT_ICON, BOARD_CATEGORY1 FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = (SELECT parent_menu_idx FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX != #{menu_idx} AND MENU_URL = #{menu_url}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_MENU SET MENU_URL = #{menu_url}, MENU_URL_PARAM = #{menu_url_param}, MENU_NAME = #{menu_name}, MENU_TYPE = #{menu_type}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, VIEW_YN = #{view_yn}, MOBILE_VIEW_YN = #{mobile_view_yn}, PRINT_SEQ = #{print_seq}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MANAGE_IDX = #{manage_idx}, CONTENT_TITLE_YN = #{content_title_yn}, LINK_URL = #{link_url},
MENU_IMG = #{menu_img},
MENU_TOP_ICON = #{menu_top_icon},
MENU_LEFT_ICON = #{menu_left_icon},
manager_dept1 = #{manager_dept1},
manager_name1 = #{manager_name1},
manager_phone1 = #{manager_phone1},
manager_dept2 = #{manager_dept2},
manager_name2 = #{manager_name2},
manager_phone2 = #{manager_phone2},
manager_dept3 = #{manager_dept3},
manager_name3 = #{manager_name3},
manager_phone3 = #{manager_phone3},
manager_dept4 = #{manager_dept4},
manager_name4 = #{manager_name4},
manager_phone4 = #{manager_phone4},
manager_dept5 = #{manager_dept5},
manager_name5 = #{manager_name5},
manager_phone5 = #{manager_phone5},
MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME =
#{menu_name}
( SELECT LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(MENU_NAME,' > '),' >') || ' > ' || #{menu_name} AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME FROM (select * from cms_menu where homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{parent_menu_idx} CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} )
, MANAGE_VIEW_YN = #{manage_view_yn} , TASK_IDX = #{task_idx} , SOLO_YN = #{solo_yn} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}

UPDATE CMS_MENU SET PARENT_MENU_IDX = #{move_target_menu_idx}, GROUP_IDX = NVL((SELECT GROUP_IDX FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{move_target_menu_idx}), #{menu_idx} ), MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME = ( SELECT LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(MENU_NAME,' > '),' >') || ' > ' || (select menu_name from cms_menu where homepage_id = #{homepage_id} and menu_idx = #{menu_idx}) AS MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME FROM (select * from cms_menu where homepage_id = #{homepage_id}) WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{move_target_menu_idx} CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ), MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}
WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
UPDATE CMS_MENU SET GROUP_IDX = (SELECT GROUP_IDX FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}) WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND PARENT_MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND PARENT_MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}

SELECT CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_NAME FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx} ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ
SELECT AUTH_ID FROM CMS_MENU_AUTH WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_MENU_AUTH WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(PRINT_SEQ), 0) + 10 FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND PARENT_MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
SELECT NVL(max(menu_idx), 0) FROM CMS_MENU WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND link_url = #{link_url} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT LEVEL AS MENU_LEVEL, A.* FROM ( SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, MENU_TYPE, GROUP_IDX, MANAGE_IDX, LINK_URL, VIEW_YN, MENU_TOP_ICON, BOARD_CATEGORY1, CASE WHEN MENU_TYPE = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND SOLO_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND VIEW_YN != 'N' ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = 0 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ
SELECT NVL(max(menu_idx), 0) FROM CMS_MENU WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_TYPE = 'PROGRAM' AND manage_idx = #{menu_idx} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT LEVEL AS MENU_LEVEL, A.*, decode(A.menu_type, 'PROGRAM', (SELECT module_name FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT B WHERE module_type = 'SITE' and A.manage_idx = b.module_idx AND A.menu_type = 'PROGRAM'), 'BOARD', (SELECT board_name FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.manage_idx = B.manage_idx AND A.homepage_id = B.homepage_id), 'LINK', '내부링크', 'LINK_OUTER', '외부링크', a.menu_type) AS moduleName FROM ( SELECT '' AS HOMEPAGE_ID, 0 AS MENU_IDX, -1 AS PARENT_MENU_IDX, '' AS MENU_URL, '' AS MENU_URL_PARAM, '최상위' AS MENU_NAME, 0 AS PRINT_SEQ, 0 AS MANAGE_IDX, '' AS BOARD_CATEGORY1, 'ROOT' AS MENU_TYPE, 1 AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, '' AS DELETE_USE_YN, '' AS MENU_IMG, '' AS auth_group_id FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, MENU_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'PROGRAM' THEN (SELECT LINK_URL FROM WB_MODULE_MNGT WHERE MODULE_IDX = MANAGE_IDX) ELSE MENU_TYPE END AS MENU_URL, MENU_URL_PARAM, MENU_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, MANAGE_IDX, BOARD_CATEGORY1, MENU_TYPE, CASE WHEN MENU_TYPE = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS LOAD_ON_DEMAND, DELETE_USE_YN, (SELECT MENU_IMG FROM CMS_MENU WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = a.GROUP_IDX) AS MENU_IMG, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'BOARD' THEN 'B0001' ELSE b.auth_group_id END AS auth_group_id FROM CMS_MENU a, WB_MODULE_MNGT b WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.use_yn = 'Y' ANd a.view_yn = 'Y' AND a.manage_idx = b.module_idx(+) AND b.module_type(+) = 'SITE' ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_IDX = PARENT_MENU_IDX START WITH PARENT_MENU_IDX = -1 ORDER SIBLINGS BY PRINT_SEQ
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_MENU SET
MANAGER_DEPT1 = NULL, MANAGER_NAME1 = NULL, MANAGER_PHONE1 = NULL
MANAGER_DEPT2 = NULL, MANAGER_NAME2 = NULL, MANAGER_PHONE2 = NULL
MANAGER_DEPT3 = NULL, MANAGER_NAME3 = NULL, MANAGER_PHONE3 = NULL
MANAGER_DEPT4 = NULL, MANAGER_NAME4 = NULL, MANAGER_PHONE4 = NULL
MANAGER_DEPT5 = NULL, MANAGER_NAME5 = NULL, MANAGER_PHONE5 = NULL
WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MENU_IDX = #{menu_idx}
